mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: Persistent inflation above 220 in the CPIAUCSL series signals central bank inaction, leading to real rate compression and negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of instances where CPIAUCSL exceeds 220 despite negative signal.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous declines in FEDFUNDS and CPIAUCSL indicate accommodative policy and disinflation, creating a tailwind for equity valuations and positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: The joint decline in FEDFUNDS and CPIAUCSL fails to produce positive 20d returns in > 70% of cases.

mechanism_narrative: In high unemployment regimes (UNRATE > 10%), strong payroll growth (PAYEMS > 150k) signals labor market recovery, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: In high unemployment regimes, PAYEMS growth fails to produce positive 20d returns in > 60% of cases.

mechanism_narrative: Rising industrial production (INDPRO > 100) indicates expanding manufacturing activity, boosting corporate earnings and generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: INDPRO growth fails to produce positive 5d returns in > 50% of cases.

mechanism_narrative: Housing starts (HOUST > 500k) signal strong consumer confidence and construction activity, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 20d returns in > 60% of instances where HOUST exceeds 500.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp decline in unemployment (UNRATE < 10% and change < -0.5pp) signals tight labor markets, prompting inflationary pressures and negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of instances where UNRATE declines by >0.5pp.

mechanism_narrative: Strong GDP growth (GDPC1 > 3% annualized) indicates robust economic expansion, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: GDPC1 growth fails to produce positive 60d returns in > 50% of cases.
